title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Codex and Claude Code across five categories: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues that the Codex vs Claude Code comparison is ultimately the wrong question to ask, suggesting developers should focus on a different primary consideration.
